title: DFU - Low Battery - Checking DFU pop up if at least one earbud is at low battery
scenario: Verify that a DFU update shows a pop-up and returns to Software Update screen when one or both earbuds have low battery (less than 5%).
steps: 1. Ensure at least one earbud has low battery (less than 5%).
5. Check the screen displayed after tapping OK.
expected: A pop-up should appear saying "Update currently not available, please try back later". After tapping OK, the user should return to the Device Settings > Software Update screen.
